diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@
     args = ap.parse_args()

 

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

-    ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device)

+    ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device, weights_only=False)

     cfg = ckpt['cfg']

     model = ResMLP(cfg['in_dim'], cfg['out_dim'], hidden=cfg['hidden'], depth=cfg['depth']).to(device)

     model.load_state_dict(ckpt['state_dict'])

@@ -28,7 +28,6 @@
             with torch.cuda.amp.autocast(dtype=torch.bfloat16):

                 p = model(xb)

             preds[i:i+16384] = p.float().cpu().numpy()

-    # Override degenerate dims

     preds[:, degenerate_mask] = train_y_mean[degenerate_mask]

 

     out_stem = os.path.splitext(args.output)[0]
